market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your private retreat in [Location], this beautifully appointed entire home sleeps 4 guests with three en-suite bedrooms offering privacy and comfort. Perfect for families or groups seeking space, the property features [mention any hidden strengths like proximity to attractions or unique layout]. With 23 open nights available in the next 90 days, book now to secure this highly sought-after listing (73.9% occupancy). While amenities will be detailed to enhance your stay, the 4.71-star rating reflects our commitment to hospitality. [Add specific location benefits if available].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with a wide-angle shot of the living area showing space and style. Interior photos with natural light perform best in occupancy-focused markets.
key_diagnosis: Title lacks urgency; 73.9% occupancy exceeds cohort median (47.8%) but isn't highlighted
Missing 3 high-value amenity categories impacting conversion (outdoor/parking/entertainment)
Photo data absent - market winners have 30+ images with front-loaded room diversity
analysis.outreach_hook: With 23 open nights at £143.20/night, 3 missing high-value amenities are creating lost revenue opportunities for this 4.71-rated listing
